channel.title: Aleks
channel.description: A technical blog about frontend engineering, AI coding workflows, and cross-platform development.

item.title: The Art of Constraint: From Primogeniture to Harness Engineering
item.description: Exploring the underlying logic of civilization and technology: How the ancient system of primogeniture and modern AI Harness Engineering both utilize 'constraint' to transform chaos into order and power.

item.title: Electron Notes
item.description: A comprehensive guide to mastering the core of Electron desktop development: Main and Renderer processes, IPC communication, ContextBridge security practices, engineering workflows, and performance optimization strategies.

item.title: Integrating Kimi K2 Model into Claude Code
item.description: A step-by-step guide on how to integrate the Kimi K2 model into Claude Code, including environment setup, API Key configuration, model switching verification, and troubleshooting.

item.title: SSE Server-Sent Events
item.description: A comprehensive guide to Server-Sent Events (SSE) from principles to code, covering communication mechanisms, client APIs, server implementations, and common use cases.

item.title: Integrating Figma MCP with Cursor
item.description: A complete guide on integrating Figma MCP with Cursor, including environment setup, starting the MCP service, configuring mcp.json, and efficiently converting designs to code.

item.title: The Minimum Delay Mechanism of setTimeout
item.description: An in-depth explanation of JavaScript's setTimeout minimum delay mechanism, combining HTML specifications and browser implementations to explain why a 0ms timer is clamped to 4ms.

item.title: Floating-Point Rendering Differences in H5: iOS vs Android
item.description: A comparison of floating-point rendering differences between iOS and Android in H5, analyzing text, layout, and borders, with cross-platform compatibility tips.

item.title: Vue3 Compiler Macros: Usage and Principles
item.description: A systematic overview of the usage and underlying principles of Vue3 compiler macros, covering common macros like defineProps, defineEmits, withDefaults, and defineModel.

item.title: Handwritten instanceof Implementation
item.description: A detailed explanation of the principles behind JavaScript's instanceof operator and how to implement it from scratch.
